bracu_official.title: Recruitment Notice
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University has published an official notice regarding current recruitment opportunities.

bracu_official.title: LLB Final Exam Schedule: Spring 2026
bracu_official.summary: The final examination schedule for LLB students for the Spring 2026 semester has been released.

bracu_official.title: Last Date of Payment for Summer 2026
bracu_official.summary: Students are reminded that June 27th is the last date for payment for the Summer 2026 semester.

bracu_official.title: ‘Eco-Friendly Cafeteria’ initiative encourages sustainable choices at BRAC University
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University has launched an ‘Eco-Friendly Cafeteria’ initiative to promote and encourage sustainable choices among its community.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University law graduate awarded prestigious joint doctoral scholarship between the University of Glasgow and the University of Sydney
bracu_official.summary: A BRAC University law graduate has secured a prestigious joint doctoral scholarship from the University of Glasgow and the University of Sydney.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University law alumni association’s new executive committee takes charge for 2026–2028 term
bracu_official.summary: The new executive committee for the BRAC University law alumni association has officially commenced its term for 2026–2028.
